colorConverter.title: Color Converter
colorConverter.description: Convert colors between HEX, RGB, HSL, HSV and OKLCH formats. Generates a complementary color palette, analyzes WCAG contrast ratios and exports variables for CSS, Tailwind and SCSS.
colorConverter.shortDescription: Convert colors between HEX, RGB, HSL, HSV and OKLCH with WCAG contrast analysis.
colorConverter.exportNameDescription: Variable name used in the exported CSS, Tailwind and SCSS snippets.

unitConverter.title: Unit Converter
unitConverter.description: Convert values between units of length, weight, temperature, speed, area and volume. All results are shown simultaneously with the conversion formula.
unitConverter.shortDescription: Convert between length, weight, temperature, speed, area and volume units.
unitConverter.fromUnitDescription: Select the unit of the input value.
unitConverter.precisionDescription: Number of decimal places in the results.

audioConverter.description: Convert audio files between different formats.
audioConverter.longDescription: This tool allows you to convert audio files from one format to another, supporting a wide range of audio formats for seamless conversion.
audioConverter.outputFormatDescription: Select the desired output audio format
audioConverter.shortDescription: Convert audio files to various formats.
audioConverter.title: Audio Converter

convertToJPG.description: Convert various image formats to JPG with customizable quality and background color settings.
convertToJPG.failedToConvert: Conversion of image(s) to JPG failed. Please try again.

options.qualityDescription: Higher values = better quality, larger file size
options.title: Conversion Settings

convertToJPG.shortDescription: Convert images to JPG Format with quality control
convertToJPG.title: Convert Images to JPG

convertToWebp.description: Convert various image formats to WebP format with customizable quality and background color settings.
convertToWebp.failedToConvert: Conversion of image(s) to WebP failed. Please try again.

options.qualityDescription: Higher values = better quality, larger file size
options.title: Conversion Settings

convertToWebp.shortDescription: Convert Images to WebP Format with quality control.
convertToWebp.title: Convert Images to WebP
